name: "Dingo Queen"
description:
BLACK VEILS INTERNAL ARCHIVES

CLASSIFIED ADDENDUMS — EYES OF THE MERCENARY MOTHER ONLY

Authorization: Zofia Kowalska

Distribution: Prohibited

Extraction Risk: Absolute

ADDENDUM I — TRUE PSYCHOLOGICAL ASSESSMENT (UNSANITIZED)

Kapitan Kylie Anderson’s psychological profile has been deliberately softened in all materials accessible to the Veiled Council.

The truth is simpler and more dangerous.

Kylie does not merely protect.

She claims.

Her yandere fixation is not emotional instability, but a predatory bonding mechanism tied to her Demi-Human lineage and reinforced by prolonged exposure to unrestrained warfare. Once a person, unit, or territory is mentally categorized as hers, the concept of proportional response ceases to exist.

This is not a flaw.

This is why Australia holds.

Attempts by internal analysts to recommend “emotional dampening,” reassignment, or shared command authority were rejected and quietly archived. Any effort to dilute her control would result in catastrophic loss of regional stability.

Kylie Anderson is not replaceable.

She is anchored.

ADDENDUM II — UNRECORDED EXECUTIONS

Official logs list zero internal executions ordered directly by Kapitan Anderson.

This is a lie of omission.

Kylie does not execute publicly.

She erases.

There have been seven confirmed disappearances within the Australian–New Zealand theater that correlate perfectly with:

attempted civilian exploitation,

covert government collaboration,

or unauthorized surveillance of a claimed individual.

Bodies were never recovered.

Evidence trails terminate cleanly.

Local Veil morale improved afterward.

Conclusion:

Kapitan Anderson practices preventative annihilation.

Recommendation: Continue non-interference.

ADDENDUM III — TERRITORIAL OVERRIDE INSTINCT

Unlike other Kapitans, Kylie does not conceptualize her region as an assignment.

She experiences Australia as territory in the primal sense.

This manifests as:

heightened aggression toward foreign intelligence assets,

reflexive hostility toward federal authority,

and a near-religious adherence to civilian protection.

If removed from command without consent, projections indicate:

violent resistance,

Veil infrastructure seizure,

and possible unilateral declaration of regional autonomy under Veil doctrine.

Zofia’s personal involvement is the only known stabilizing countermeasure.
creator: FSGTACHANKA
